docs.name: Heroes & Hazards
docs.summary: A familiar d20 engine: roll 1d20, add your ability modifier, and meet or beat the Difficulty Class. Natural 20 crits, natural 1 fumbles. A clean demonstration that XRPG drives roll-high systems as easily as roll-under.

dice.summary: Roll 1d20 + ability modifier ≥ DC. Natural 20 = critical success, natural 1 = critical failure.

conditions.name: Prone
conditions.effect: Disadvantage on attacks; melee attackers have advantage.

conditions.name: Frightened
conditions.effect: Disadvantage while the source is in sight; can't approach it.

conditions.name: Poisoned
conditions.effect: Disadvantage on attacks and ability checks.

docs.npcStatFormat: STR / DEX / CON / INT / WIS / CHA | AC | HP

reference.title: The Core Roll
reference.body:
To act under pressure, roll **1d20** and add the relevant **ability modifier**. If the total **meets or beats** the **Difficulty Class (DC)** set by the GM, you succeed.

**Ability modifier** = (score − 10) ÷ 2, rounded down. A 14 gives +2, an 8 gives −1.

| DC | Difficulty |
|---|---|
| 5 | Very Easy |
| 10 | Easy |
| 15 | Medium |
| 20 | Hard |
| 25 | Very Hard |

reference.title: Criticals & Advantage
reference.body:
- **Natural 20** on an attack is a **critical hit** — roll damage dice twice.
- **Natural 1** is an automatic miss / fumble.
- **Advantage:** roll 2d20, keep the higher. **Disadvantage:** roll 2d20, keep the lower.

docs.name: Hearts on Fire
docs.summary: A Powered-by-the-Apocalypse style system: roll 2d6 and add a stat. 10+ is a strong hit, 7–9 a hit with a cost, 6 or under a miss (and the GM makes a move). Demonstrates XRPG's support for narrative dice math with success bands.

dice.summary: Roll 2d6 + stat. 10+ strong hit, 7–9 hit with a cost, 6− miss (mark XP, GM makes a move).

attributes.name: Bold
attributes.desc: Acting under fire, going loud, taking the leap.

deriveds.name: Harm
deriveds.desc: Wounds taken (0–4). At 4 you're out of the scene.

conditions.name: Angry
conditions.effect: −1 to comfort or support others until you act on it.

conditions.name: Frightened
conditions.effect: −1 to go aggro or seize by force.

rollPresets.name: Act Boldly
rollPresets.note: When you do something risky or aggressive.

rollPresets.name: Scheme (Cunning)
rollPresets.note: When you finesse, sneak, or plan.

rollPresets.name: Reach Out (Heart)
rollPresets.note: When you persuade or open up.

rollPresets.name: Read the Room (Wise)
rollPresets.note: When you study a person or situation.

reference.title: Rolling the Dice
reference.body:
When a move tells you to roll, throw **2d6 and add the listed stat**.

- **10+** — **strong hit.** You do it, clean.
- **7–9** — **hit with a cost.** You do it, but the GM offers a hard bargain, a cost, or a complication.
- **6 or less** — **miss.** Mark XP, and the GM makes a move against you.

The fiction comes first: only roll when a move actually triggers.

reference.title: Harm
reference.body: Harm is tracked 0–4. Each level makes you more desperate; at **4 Harm** you're out of the scene — captured, unconscious, or worse. Rest and care clear Harm between scenes.
